ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger survived (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Gender of the passenger (0 = Male, 1 = Female) */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Passenger fare */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of Embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the passenger data (e.g., historical records, interviews) */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket FOREIGN KEY ("ticket") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES embarkation_ports ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code representing the port (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (1 = 1st, 2 = 2nd, 3 = 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck where the class is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender (0 = Male, 1 = Female) */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was issued */,
  "issue_location" TEXT /* Location where the ticket was issued */,
  "ticket_class_id" INTEGER /* Class ID of the ticket */,
  "ship_fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ship ticket */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes paid on the ticket */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the ticket (fare + taxes) */,
  "booking_class" TEXT /* Booking class (e.g., economy, business) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Name of the lead researcher */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data usage event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the data was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., analysis, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
